name: pern-monorepo
description: PERN Stack Monorepo with React Frontend and Express Backend

scripts.start:scenario-clean: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run start:scenario-clean" "cd packages/frontend && npm run start:scenario-clean"
scripts.start:scenario-low: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run start:scenario-low" "cd packages/frontend && npm run start:scenario-low"
scripts.start:scenario-high: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run start:scenario-high" "cd packages/frontend && npm run start:scenario-high"
scripts.start:scenario-db: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run start:scenario-db" "cd packages/frontend && npm run start:scenario-db"
scripts.rollback:from-high: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run rollback:from-high" "cd packages/frontend && npm run rollback:from-high"
scripts.rollback:from-low: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run start:nr" "cd packages/frontend && npm run rollback:from-low"
scripts.rollback:all: concurrently "cd packages/backend && npm run rollback:all" "cd packages/frontend && npm run rollback:all"
